mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, level, deleted_at, created_at, updated_at FROM admin_role WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT id, user_id, level, deleted_at, created_at, updated_at FROM admin_role
WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
ORDER BY level DESC, user_id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO admin_role (user_id, level, deleted_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{level}, NULL)
mapper.update: UPDATE admin_role SET level = #{level}, deleted_at = NULL WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE admin_role SET deleted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM admin_role WHERE level = 1 AND deleted_at IS NULL
